game_info.title: Portal Chambers
game_info.concept:
Portal™ is a new single player game from Valve. Set in the mysterious Aperture Science Laboratories, Portal has been called one of the most innovative new games on the horizon and will offer gamers hours of unique gameplay. Portal™ is a new single player game from Valve. Set in the mysterious Aperture Science Laboratories, Portal has been called one of the most innovative new games on the horizon and will offer gamers hours of unique gameplay.
The game is designed to change the way players approach, manipulate, and surmise the possibilities in a given environment; similar to how Half-Life® 2's Gravity Gun innovated new ways to leverage an object in any given situation.
Players must solve physical puzzles and challenges by opening portals to maneuvering objects, and themselves, through space.
game_info.description: Welcome to Portal Chambers! Navigate through test chambers using your dual portal device. Fire blue and orange portals on white surfaces to create instant teleportation connections. Use portals to reach platforms, cross gaps, and solve physics-based puzzles. Momentum is preserved through portals - enter fast, exit fast! Complete each chamber by reaching the exit door to advance to the next challenge.
game_info.controls:
WASD / Arrow Keys: Move player forward/backward/strafe left/right
Space: Jump
Mouse Click / Z: Fire blue portal (portal 1)
Shift / X: Fire orange portal (portal 2)
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart to main menu
Enter: Start game from menu

TEST_1.test_description: Testing basic portal creation and player teleportation mechanics. Validates that portals can be placed on valid surfaces and that the player correctly teleports when entering a portal.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Place a blue portal on a nearby wall, then place an orange portal on another wall. Move the player through one portal and verify they emerge from the other portal at the correct position and orientation.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player successfully teleports between portals, maintaining momentum. Portals are visually displayed correctly on surfaces. Player exits the portal facing the correct direction based on surface normal.

TEST_2.test_description: Testing win condition by reaching the exit door. Validates that the player can complete a chamber by navigating to the exit using portals.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Create portals to reach elevated platforms. Navigate through the chamber using portal mechanics to reach the exit door. Touch the exit door to complete the level.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Game transitions to GAME_OVER_WIN state when player reaches exit. Win screen displays with score and restart option. Game properly resets when R is pressed.
